docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-05-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-05-2014 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ELAN LAMBERT. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELAN LAMBERT. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARDIRE, JOEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GAERIAN, REYNALDO $5,620.18 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,750.18 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
